ecarx.carext.vehicle.module

Interface IADAS


  • public interface IADAS
    高级驾驶辅助系统

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field and Description
      static int ACC_WITH_TSR
      Choose the fusion ACC IVehicle#SPEED_CONTROL_MODE_ACC with TSR(TSI: Traffic Sigh Info) or not 自动识别限速(ACC + TSR) ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_ACCESS_READ_WRITE VehicleAreaType.VEHICLE_AREA_TYPE_GLOBAL ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_CHANGE_MODE_ONCHANGE Boolean property type deliang.feng@ecarxgroup.com created for project hongqi at 2024-06-25 14:49:58
      static int AUTO_LANE_CHANGE
      Pilot driver assistance switch 领航驾驶辅助开关,原值：SETTING_FUNC_AUTO_LANE_CHANGE ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_ACCESS_READ_WRITE VehicleAreaType.VEHICLE_AREA_TYPE_GLOBAL ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_CHANGE_MODE_ONCHANGE Boolean property type fei.hu@ecarxgroup.com created for project hongqi at 2024-06-18 20:31:55
      static int AUTONOMOUS_EMERGENCY_BRAKING
      the setting to activate/deactivate Autonomous Emergency Braking(AEB) function<br> 自动紧急制动，原值SETTING_FUNC_AUTONOMOUS_EMERGENCY_BRAKING ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_ACCESS_READ_WRITE VehicleAreaType.VEHICLE_AREA_TYPE_GLOBAL ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_CHANGE_MODE_ONCHANGE Boolean property type true/false fei.hu@ecarxgroup.com created for project hongqi at 2024-06-18 17:57:06
      static int DOOR_OPEN_WARN_ACTIVE
      DOW, to activate and deactivate Door open warning<br> 车门开启提醒(DOW)开关，原值：SETTING_FUNC_DOOR_OPEN_WARN_ACTIVE ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_ACCESS_READ_WRITE VehicleAreaType.VEHICLE_AREA_TYPE_GLOBAL ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_CHANGE_MODE_ONCHANGE Boolean property type fei.hu@ecarxgroup.com created for project hongqi at 2024-06-18 20:09:24
      static int DRIVER_PERFOR_SUPPORT
      the setting to activate/deactivate Driver Performance Support(DPS) function<br> 驾驶员状态监测，原值：SETTING_FUNC_DRIVER_PERFOR_SUPPORT ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_ACCESS_READ_WRITE VehicleAreaType.VEHICLE_AREA_TYPE_GLOBAL ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_CHANGE_MODE_ONCHANGE Boolean property type fei.hu@ecarxgroup.com created for project hongqi at 2024-06-18 20:38:37
      static int EMERGENCY_LANE_KEEP_AID
      Emergency Lane Keeping Assist ELK function adjustment 紧急车道保持辅助ELK功能开关 ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_ACCESS_READ_WRITE VehicleAreaType.VEHICLE_AREA_TYPE_GLOBAL ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_CHANGE_MODE_ONCHANGE Boolean property type wei.jin@ecarxgroup.com created for project hongqi at 2024-08-09 09:21:59
      static int FORWARD_COLLISION_WARN_SNVT
      Allows the user to change settings for Forward Collision Warning sensitivity<br> 前碰撞预警灵敏等级,原值SETTING_FUNC_FORWARD_COLLISION_WARN_SNVTY ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_ACCESS_READ_WRITE VehicleAreaType.VEHICLE_AREA_TYPE_GLOBAL ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_CHANGE_MODE_ONCHANGE IADAS.ForwardCollisionWarnSnvtyMode property type fei.hu@ecarxgroup.com created for project hongqi at 2024-06-18 20:06:05
      static int INTELLIGENT_DRIVING_ASSISTANCE_MODE
      intelligent driving assistance mode selection, etc: ACC ISS(SACC) HNOA 智能驾驶辅助模式选择 ACC ICC(SACC) HNOA 等 ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_ACCESS_READ_WRITE VehicleAreaType.VEHICLE_AREA_TYPE_GLOBAL ICarConfig.VEHICLE_PROPERTY_CHANGE_MODE_ONCHANGE IADAS.IntelligentDrivingMode property type fei.hu@ecarxgroup.com created for project hongqi at 2024-06-18 20:19:25
